zh-cn.ActionResult_tooltip_weaponInCooldown: 武器 $weapon$ 不可被使用，剩余冷却轮数 $count$
zh-cn.ActionResult_tooltip_insufficientReach: 射程 $reach$ 低于双方距离 $distance$
zh-cn.ActionResult_tooltip_insufficientTrackin: 追踪 $tracking$ 低于对象闪避 $evasion$
zh-cn.ActionResult_tooltip_damageConversion: 基础伤害 $str$ x $mult$ 武器倍率，最终伤害 $final$ $types$
zh-cn.ActionResult_tooltip_unsupportedWeapon: 使用的武器不支持该动作种类
zh-cn.ActionResult_tooltip_changeWeapon: $self$将使用中的$prev$替换成了$last$（$prev$冷却时间$cooldown$）
zh-cn.ActionResult_tooltip_attackExecution: 对象$name$处于失衡状态，$exec$攻击！
zh-cn.ui_combatSim_starting: 开始 $names_a$ 与 $names_b$ 之间的模拟战斗
zh-cn.ui_combatSim_randWeapon: 队伍中没有武器的成员会随机获得一把武器
zh-cn.ui_combatAction_tooltip:
词条：$kwds$
速度$speed$ $mov$ 体势$pos$ 闪避$evasion$$target$
zh-cn.ui_combatAction_tooltip_attack: 追踪$tracking$ 射程$range$ 基础伤害$str$ 伤害类型 $types$
zh-cn.ui_combatAction_tooltip_condMod_Speed: 前一个动作持有 $conditions$ 词条时 速度$value$
zh-cn.ui_combatAction_tooltip_condMod: 前一个动作持有 $conditions$ 词条时 $attribute$$value$
zh-cn.ui_counterAction_tooltip:
当满足下例条件时，会派生动作 $counters$
条件：$conditions$
zh-cn.combat_turnEnd_defeat: 战斗失败 我方无可战斗人员
zh-cn.combat_turnEnd_timeLimit: 战斗结束 到达战斗轮数上限
zh-cn.ui_actor_actionsCount_tooltip:
角色的每回合的行动次数，最低为2
敌对NPC的最高行动次数没有上限，而玩家角色可以主动增加当回合的行动次数直到等同于单个敌对NPC的最高行动次数
当角色增加了当回合行动次数后，下一个回合该角色无法增加行动次数。
zh-cn.ui_combat_hp:
HP
角色受到的HP伤害向下取整，当该数值为0时角色不可行动。
zh-cn.ui_combat_stat_posture_tooltip:
当角色的体势大于0时，受到的伤害会75%转换为体势伤害（向上取整）没被转换的会作为HP伤害（向下取整）
当体势归0时角色会失去（当前行动顺序下计算的）下一个行动，并且在下下次行动（不包括回合外行动）时恢复所有体势（如果当回合内行动次数大于2）
若体势归0的角色本回合内行动次数不超过2，则也可以在下回合开始时恢复所有体势
zh-cn.ui_combat_stat_evasion_tooltip:
当角色承受的攻击的追踪数值低于该角色的当前回避，角色会回避那一次攻击，当前回避扣除当次攻击的追踪数值
执行防御动作给予的回避值能够与当前数值累计，执行任何攻击动作时回避值会重置为该攻击提供的回避值（通常为0）
zh-cn.combat_inturn_actions_tooltip:
双方角色可以主动安排的行动类别
在判断行动先后顺序时，所有同序号的行动之间按照速度从大到小排列
双方速度同等时，后来者居后（也就意味之我方与敌方同速度时，敌方必定先动）
zh-cn.combat_eot_actions_tooltip:
当有角色执行的%%combat_inturn_actions%%次数低于当回合最大值时（也就是当回合该角色执行的动作比某人低时），会获得1次回合结束时结算的额外行动
该行动不会触发反击
zh-cn.combat_action_EOTaction_tooltip: 满足特定条件后能够使用的额外行动，不计入角色的本回合行动次数内，且不会触发任何反击
zh-cn.ui_combat_actions_list_tooltip: 双方全角色的行动会在此按照行动顺序排列，且也会按照该顺序结算
zh-cn.ui_combat_result_preview_tooltip: 预测内容会显示该行动能否命中，但不会预测伤害数值或是否击穿防御等
zh-cn.ui_combat_preview_distance: 射程 $range$ vs 相对距离 $distance$

en-us.ActionResult_tooltip_insufficientTrackin: Tracking $tracking$ is lower than target Evasion $evasion$
en-us.ActionResult_tooltip_damageConversion: Base Damage $str$ x $mult$ Weapon Multiplier, Final Damage $final$ $types$
en-us.ActionResult_tooltip_unsupportedWeapon: Action type not supported by current weapon
en-us.ActionResult_tooltip_cannotAct_lowHP: $self$ cannot act due to insufficient HP
en-us.ActionResult_tooltip_cannotAct_postureBr: $self$ cannot act due to posture break
en-us.ui_combatSim_randWeapon: Team members without weapons will receive a random one
en-us.ui_combatAction_tooltip_attack: Tracking $tracking$ Range $range$ Base Dmg $str$ Dmg Type $types$
en-us.ui_combatAction_tooltip_condMod_Speed: Speed $value$ if previous action has $conditions$ keyword
en-us.ui_counterAction_tooltip:
Triggers bonus action $counters$ when conditions are met
Condition: $conditions$
en-us.ui_actor_actionsCount_tooltip:
Actions per turn for a character, min 2
Enemy NPC has no cap on actions, and Player's team members can manually increase their turn actions up to match  enemy NPC's max actions
If a character's action count goes above 2, then their action count cannot go above 2 in the following turn.
en-us.ui_combat_hp:
HP
Any HP damage will be rounded down. Cannot act when HP reaches or falls below 0.
en-us.ui_combat_stat_posture_tooltip:
When Posture > 0, 75% of damage taken converts to Posture damage (round up), and the remainder as HP damage (round down)
When Posture hits 0, character loses its next action, and recovers all Posture on the action after (excluding out-of-turn actions) if it has more than 2 actions queued this turn
If the Posture broken character wasn't going to act more than 2 times, then it recovers all Posture at start of next turn
en-us.ui_combat_stat_evasion_tooltip:
When incoming attack's Tracking < target Evasion, the attack is evaded, and target's Evasion reduces by attack's Tracking value
All Defensive actions, if they provide any Evasion, stacks with existing Evasion. All Attack action resets Evasion to that attack's Evasion (usually 0)
en-us.combat_inturn_actions_tooltip:
Actions manually scheduled by both sides of the battle
Actions are ordered in descending by their Speed value, and they will resolve in this order.
If Speed value are equal, then the first registered action comes first (which means on a same Speed value, Enemy's action will always act first)
en-us.combat_eot_actions_tooltip:
When character execute fewer %%combat_inturn_actions%% than the max action observed this turn (i.e. there exist someone who acted even more times), gains 1 extra action at turn end
This action resolves at turn end, and it will not trigger any counter action
en-us.combat_action_EOTaction_tooltip: Extra action available under specific conditions, does not count towards turn limit, and triggers no counters
en-us.ui_combat_actions_list_tooltip: All character actions are listed here in Speed order, and will be resolved in this order
en-us.ui_combat_result_preview_tooltip: Preview shows hit chance, but not damage values or defense penetration
